nasb.text: When Pharaoh does not listen to you, then I will lay My hand on Egypt and bring out My hosts, My people the sons of Israel, from the land of Egypt by great judgments.

esv.text: Pharaoh will not listen to you. Then I will lay my hand on Egypt and bring my hosts, my people the children of Israel, out of the land of Egypt by great acts of judgment.

cnv.text: 可是法老不聽你們的話，我必下手擊打埃及；藉著嚴厲的刑罰把我的軍隊，我的人民以色列人，從埃及地領出來。

ccb.text: 他将无动于衷。那时，我必伸手重重地惩罚埃及，然后领我的大队子民离开埃及。
